selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a robust content moderation strategy in place. This can involve using AI-powered tools to detect and remove fake content, as well as implementing human moderators to review and verify content before it goes live. Additionally, social media platforms should prioritize transparency and accountability by providing clear guidelines for what constitutes fake content and how it will be addressed. Users should also be educated on how to identify and report fake content, and how to use privacy settings to protect themselves from exposure to false information.",
"reasoning_summary": "To manage and deal with fake content on social media, a multi-faceted approach is necessary, involving both technological and human intervention. AI-powered tools can help detect and remove fake content, while human moderators can review and verify content before it goes live. Additionally, transparency and accountability are key, with clear guidelines for what constitutes fake content and how it will be addressed. Users should also be educated on how to identify and report fake content, and how to use privacy settings to protect themselves from exposure to false information.",
"tone": "informative",
"citations": [],
"safety_notes": "",
"used_persona_fields": ["persona"]
}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to have a robust content moderation strategy in place. This can involve using AI-powered tools to detect and remove fake content, as well as implementing human moderators to review and verify content before it goes live. Additionally, social media platforms should prioritize transparency and accountability by providing clear guidelines for what constitutes fake content and how it will be addressed. Users should also be educated on how to identify and report fake content, and how to use privacy settings to protect themselves from exposure to false information.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, a multi-faceted approach is necessary, involving both technological and human intervention. AI-powered tools can help detect and remove fake content, while human moderators can review and verify content before it goes live. Additionally, transparency and accountability are key, with clear guidelines for what constitutes fake content and how it will be addressed. Users should also be educated on how to identify and report fake content, and how to use privacy settings to protect themselves from exposure to false information.
